extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME Christopher defended GC by shadowing DUMOULIN Tom's three attacks in final 9km, then counterattacked when Dutch rider cracked
tactical_patterns: Dumoulin attacked three times in 9km but went into red without establishing gap, revealing poor pacing calibration under pressure.
Froome counterattacked immediately when Dumoulin cracked rather than soft-pedaling, indicating willingness to maximize damage over sitting defensively with 40-second lead.
Astana and Sky controlled breakaway gap all day despite Dumoulin needing stage win for bonuses, showing Team Sky forced rivals to chase.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: dropped second consecutive day, suggesting Finestre effort irreversibly depleted reserves for remaining mountain stage
rider_signals.PINARELLO Thibaut: negative: hit the wall catastrophically mid-stage requiring sugar, almost passing out—classic post-mountain-stage glycogen depletion
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: shook head after third attack and cracked, revealing either poor form or inability to pace multi-acceleration efforts
rider_signals.FROOME Christopher: positive: confident enough to ride at front between Dumoulin attacks and counterattack when rival cracked rather than defend conservatively
rider_signals.NIEVE Mikel: positive: attacked from breakaway with anger and belief, showing emotional investment can fuel late-race moves
